definition: short name of the standardized engineering unit associated with a variable, display, scale, graduation or any other means of indicating a value

definition_ml.en: short name of the standardized engineering unit associated with a variable, display, scale, graduation or any other means of indicating a value
definition_ml.de: Kurzbezeichnung der standardisierten technischen Einheit, die mit einer Variablen, einer Anzeige, einer Skala, einer Teilung oder einem anderen Mittel zur Angabe eines Wertes verbunden ist

note:
NOTE 1: Units of measure are defined in IEC 62720.
NOTE 2: Refer to IEC CDD starting with the IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
NOTE 3: To support electronic data exchange through all languages, it is strongly recommended that ONLY English "Short names" are used.

note_ml.en:
NOTE 1: Units of measure are defined in IEC 62720.
NOTE 2: Refer to IEC CDD starting with the IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
NOTE 3: To support electronic data exchange through all languages, it is strongly recommended that ONLY English "Short names" are used.
note_ml.de:
ANMERKUNG 1: Maßeinheiten sind in IEC 62720 definiert.
ANMERKUNG 2: Siehe IEC CDD, beginnend mit der IRDI: 0112/2///62720#UBA000 - units of measurement.
ANMERKUNG 3: Um den elektronischen Datenaustausch in allen Sprachen zu unterstützen, wird dringend empfohlen, NUR die englische „Kurzbezeichnung“ zu verwenden.

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
remark_ml.de: auch verwendet von Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
